description: Small profile roster for selecting optional skill-like domain context before semantic_ir_v1 compilation. Selection is advisory and never authorizes writes.

profiles.description: Bounded medical memory for medications, conditions, symptoms, allergies, lab tests, lab result states, and pregnancy.
use_when: patient condition, symptom, allergy, or side effect
lab test, lab result, or measurement trend
avoid_when: clinical advice, diagnosis, treatment, dose, start, stop, or hold recommendation
non-medical custody of an object that happens to have a medical-sounding name

profiles.description: Narrative events, objects, places, possession, movement, observations, corrections, and simple story-world state.
use_when: scene description with objects and actors
object use, damage, tasting, eating, sitting, lying, or sleeping

profiles.description: Estate/probate claims, beneficiaries, witnesses, amendments, forfeiture conditions, identity ambiguity, and ledger evidence.
use_when: will, charter, amendment, witness, estate, or probate language
avoid_when: general family history without a rule or legal consequence

profiles.description: CourtListener-backed legal source intake for opinions, dockets, judges, parties, citations, claims, findings, holdings, and document provenance.
use_when: CourtListener opinion, docket, judge, filing, citation, or oral argument data
case caption, court, judge, party, attorney, citation, or date extraction
legal identity ambiguity in source records

profiles.description: Shipping, warehouse, access logs, custody, inspection, clearance, quarantine, and current-state conflicts.
use_when: crate, bay, warehouse, inspection, or custody transfer
avoid_when: fictional story with no operational state
